---
output:
  word_document:
    reference_docx: reference_doc.docx
output_file: test_document.docx
---

```{r setup, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(lubridate)
```

```{r get-files, echo=FALSE}
text_files <- list.files(path = ".", pattern = "\\.txt$", full.names = TRUE)

if (length(text_files) == 0) {
  message("No .txt files found in working directory.")
}

```

```{r reformat-functions, echo=FALSE}
reformat_in_development <- function(df) {

  # ---- Defensive column creation ----
  if (!"Expected publication date" %in% names(df)) {
    df$`Expected publication date` <- NA_character_
  }
  if (!"Type" %in% names(df)) {
    df$Type <- NA_character_
  }
  if (!"Link" %in% names(df)) {
    df$Link <- NA_character_
  }
  if (!"Title" %in% names(df)) {
    df$Title <- NA_character_
  }
  if (!"ID" %in% names(df)) {
    df$ID <- NA_character_
  }
  if (!"Medtech_ID" %in% names(df)) {
    df$Medtech_ID <- NA_character_
  }

  df <- df %>%

    # ---- Strip days from Expected publication date ----
    mutate(
      `Expected publication date` =
        str_remove_all(`Expected publication date`, "[:digit:][:digit:] |[:digit:] ")
    ) %>%

    # ---- Extract ID from Title (before any linking) ----
    mutate(ID = case_when(
      str_ends(Title, "\\]|ID[:digit:]+$|TS ID [:digit:]+$") ~ Title,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )) %>%
    mutate(ID = str_remove_all(ID, "[:punct:]|[:alpha:]")) %>%
    mutate(ID = str_extract(ID, "[:digit:]+$")) %>%
    mutate(ID = if_else(
      str_starts(ID, "\\d"),
      paste0(" [ID", ID, "]"),
      ""
    )) %>%

    # ---- Extract Medtech ID (before any linking) ----
    mutate(Medtech_ID = case_when(
      str_starts(Title, "GID-MT[:digit:]+ ") ~ Title,
      str_ends(Title, " \\(MT[:digit:]+\\)$") ~ Title,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )) %>%
    mutate(Medtech_ID = str_extract(Medtech_ID, "MT[:number:]+")) %>%
    mutate(Medtech_ID = if_else(
      !is.na(Medtech_ID),
      paste0(" [", Medtech_ID, "]"),
      ""
    )) %>%

    # ---- Clean Title text (remove IDs now captured) ----
    mutate(Title = case_when(
      str_ends(Title, "\\]|ID[:digit:]+$|TS ID [:digit:]+$|  \\[[:digit:]+\\]$") ~
        str_remove_all(
          Title,
          " TS ID.+$| \\[ID.+$| ID[:digit:]+$| \\[[:digit:]+\\]$"
        ),
      str_starts(Title, "GID-MT[:digit:]+ ") ~
        str_remove(Title, "GID-MT[:digit:]+ "),
      str_ends(Title, " \\(MT[:digit:]+\\)$") ~
        str_remove(Title, " \\(MT[:digit:]+\\)$"),
      TRUE ~ Title
    )) %>%
    
        # Some entries are split across two rows for reasons that we don't understand. The next chunk of code is designed to identify these and add a note that they need manually checking.
    
mutate(
  Link = case_when(
    !is.na(Link) & str_starts(Link, "\\(http") ~ Link,
    !is.na(Link) & str_starts(Link, "http")   ~ paste0("(", Link, ")"),
    TRUE ~ " **MANUALLY CHECK THIS LINE AND THE ONE ABOVE**"
  )
) %>%

mutate(
  Title = paste0("[", Title, "]")
) %>%
    unite(Title, Title, Link, sep = "", na.rm = TRUE) %>%

    # ---- NORMALISE TYPE *AFTER* LINK ----
  mutate(Type = str_to_lower(Type)) %>%
  mutate(Type = case_when(
  is.na(Type) | Type == "" ~ "",
  str_starts(Type, "nice") ~ str_replace(Type, "nice", ". NICE"),
  TRUE ~ paste0(". NICE ", Type)
)) %>%

    # ---- Format Expected publication date text ----
    mutate(`Expected publication date` = case_when(
      str_ends(`Expected publication date`, "TBC") ~
        ". Publication date to be confirmed",
      !is.na(`Expected publication date`) & `Expected publication date` != "" ~
        paste(". Publication expected", `Expected publication date`),
      TRUE ~ ""
    )) %>%


    # ---- FINAL MERGE ----
    unite(
      Merged,
      Title,
      Type,
      ID,
      Medtech_ID,
      `Expected publication date`,
      sep = "",
      na.rm = TRUE
    )

  df
}


reformat_published <- function(df, Link, Title, `Reference number`, Published, `Last updated`, Merged) {
  df <- df %>%
  
# To create our titles with links this code: 
# Adds brackets to the start and end of the existing URLs,
# Adds square brackets to the titles
# Merges the two columns with unite.
  
  mutate(Link = str_replace(Link, "^", "(")) %>%
  mutate(Link = str_replace(Link, "$", ")")) %>%
  mutate(Title = str_replace(Title, "^", "[")) %>%
  mutate(Title = str_replace(Title, "$", "]")) %>%
  
      # Some entries are split across two rows for reasons that we don't understand. The next chunk of code is designed to identify these and add a note that they need manually checking.
    
mutate(
  Link = case_when(
    !is.na(Link) & str_starts(Link, "\\(http") ~ Link,
    !is.na(Link) & str_starts(Link, "http")   ~ paste0("(", Link, ")"),
    TRUE ~ " **MANUALLY CHECK THIS LINE AND THE ONE ABOVE**"
  )
) %>%    
    
  unite(Title, Title, Link, sep = "", na.rm=TRUE) %>%
    
# "NICE guideline NG/CG/QS/TA.." is added before the reference number 
# e.g. NG215 will become "NICE guideline NG215"
    
  mutate(`Reference number` = str_replace_all(`Reference number`, "^NG", "NICE guideline NG"))%>%
  mutate(`Reference number` = str_replace_all(`Reference number`, "^CG", "NICE guideline CG"))%>%
  mutate(`Reference number` = str_replace_all(`Reference number`, "^QS", "NICE quality standard "))%>%
  mutate(`Reference number` = str_replace_all(`Reference number`, "^TA", "NICE technology appraisal guidance "))%>%
  mutate(`Reference number` = str_replace_all(`Reference number`, "^IPG", "NICE interventional procedures guidance "))%>%
  mutate(`Reference number` = str_replace_all(`Reference number`, "^DG", "NICE diagnostics guidance "))%>%
  mutate(`Reference number` = str_replace_all(`Reference number`, "^HST", "NICE highly specialised technologies guidance "))%>%
  mutate(`Reference number` = str_replace_all(`Reference number`, "^MTG", "NICE medical technologies guidance "))%>%
  mutate(`Reference number` = str_replace_all(`Reference number`, "^MPG", "NICE medicines practice guideline "))%>%
  mutate(`Reference number` = str_replace_all(`Reference number`, "^HTE", "NICE health technology evaluation "))%>%
  mutate(`Reference number` = str_replace_all(`Reference number`, "^HTG", "NICE healthtech guidance "))%>%
  mutate(`Reference number` = str_replace_all(`Reference number`, "^CSG", "NICE cancer service guideline "))%>%
  mutate(`Reference number` = str_replace_all(`Reference number`, "^PH", "NICE guideline "))%>%
  mutate(`Reference number` = str_replace_all(`Reference number`, "^SG", "NICE safe staffing guideline "))%>%
  mutate(`Reference number` = str_replace_all(`Reference number`, "^SC", "NICE social care guideline "))%>%
  mutate(`Reference number` = str_replace_all(`Reference number`, "^ES", "NICE evidence summary ES"))%>%
  mutate(`Reference number` = str_replace_all(`Reference number`, "^MIB", "NICE medtech innovation briefing "))%>%
  mutate(`Reference number` = str_replace_all(`Reference number`, "^ESNM", "NICE evidence summary ESNM"))%>%
  mutate(`Reference number` = str_replace_all(`Reference number`, "^ESUOM", "NICE evidence summary ESUOM"))%>%
  mutate(`Reference number` = str_replace_all(`Reference number`, "^ESMPB", "NICE evidence summary ESMPB"))%>%
    
# This code uses lubridate to reformat all the dates in the Published and Last Updated columns to display the year only 
    
  mutate(Published = format(dmy(Published),"%Y")) %>%
  mutate(`Last updated` = format(dmy(`Last updated`),"%Y")) %>%
  
# Create a column called Updated. 
    
# If the year in the Published column is equal to the year in the Last updated column, this will be blank.
    
# If the year is different to that in the Published column, the code will insert the word "updated" before the year. 
    
  mutate(Updated = case_when(
    Published == `Last updated` ~ "",
    TRUE ~ " last updated "))  %>%
  
  mutate(`Last updated`= case_when(
    `Last updated` != Published ~ paste("updated",`Last updated`, sep = " "),
    TRUE ~ ""))  %>%
  
# If the Last Updated column contains data (e.g. 'last updated 2023'), this code will paste the data across to the Published column in the format: 2020 last updated 2023.
    
  mutate(Published = case_when(
    `Last updated` != "" ~ paste(Published, `Last updated`, sep = " "),
    TRUE ~ Published))  %>%
  
# This code adds opening and closing brackets around data in the Published column. E.g. (Published 2020 last updated 2023)
    
  mutate(Published = str_replace(Published, "^", "(")) %>%
  mutate(Published = str_replace(Published, "$", ")"))  %>%
      
#Create a column called Merged. The code below will merge the Title, Published and Reference number into the new column. The merged data will be separated by a space in the new column. 
    
   mutate(Merged = "")  %>%
   unite(Merged, Merged, Title, Published, `Reference number`, sep = " ", na.rm=TRUE) 
}


reformat_deferred <- function(df) {

  df <- df %>%

      # Some entries are split across two rows for reasons that we don't understand. The next chunk of code is designed to identify these and add a note that they need manually checking.
    
mutate(
  Link = case_when(
    !is.na(Link) & str_starts(Link, "\\(http") ~ Link,
    !is.na(Link) & str_starts(Link, "http")   ~ paste0("(", Link, ")"),
    TRUE ~ " **MANUALLY CHECK THIS LINE AND THE ONE ABOVE**"
  )
) %>%  
    

mutate(
  Title = paste0("[", Title, "]")
) %>%
    unite(Title, Title, Link, sep = "", na.rm = TRUE) %>%

    # ---- Format Guidance programme to NICE style ----
    mutate(`Guidance programme` = str_to_lower(`Guidance programme`)) %>%
    mutate(`Guidance programme` = paste0(". NICE ", `Guidance programme`)) %>%

    # ---- Format Deferred ID ----
    mutate(`Deferred ID` = case_when(
      !is.na(`Deferred ID`) ~ paste0(" [ID", `Deferred ID`, "]"),
      TRUE ~ ""
    )) %>%

    # ---- Format Deferred date text ----
    mutate(`Deferred date` = case_when(
      is.na(`Deferred date`) | `Deferred date` == "" ~
        ". Publication date to be confirmed (deferred)",
      TRUE ~
        paste0(". Publication deferred – original date ", `Deferred date`)
    )) %>%

    # ---- Create final merged output ----
    unite(
      Merged,
      Title,
      `Guidance programme`,
      `Deferred ID`,
      `Deferred date`,
      sep = "",
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) %>%

    # ---- Return only what downstream code expects ----
    select(Merged)

  df
}


reformat_awaiting <- function(df) {

  # ---- Defensive column creation (REQUIRED) ----
  if (!"Title" %in% names(df)) {
    df$Title <- NA_character_
  }

  if (!"Type" %in% names(df)) {
    df$Type <- NA_character_
  }

  if (!"Link" %in% names(df)) {
    df$Link <- NA_character_
  }

  if (!"ID" %in% names(df)) {
    df$ID <- NA_character_
  }

  if (!"Medtech_ID" %in% names(df)) {
    df$Medtech_ID <- NA_character_
  }

  # ---- Begin transformations ----
#the code at the top deals with lines that are split in two when pasted into Notepad - it brings them back together
  
df <- df %>%

  # --- Extract ID from title ---
  mutate(ID = case_when(
    str_ends(Title, "\\]|ID[:digit:]+$|TS ID [:digit:]+$") ~ Title,
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )) %>%
  mutate(ID = str_remove_all(ID, "[:punct:]|[:alpha:]")) %>%
  mutate(ID = str_extract(ID, "[:digit:]+$")) %>%
  mutate(ID = if_else(str_starts(ID, "\\d"),
                      paste0(" [ID", ID, "]"),
                      "")) %>%

  # --- Medtech ID ---
  mutate(Medtech_ID = case_when(
    str_starts(Title, "GID-MT[:digit:]+ ") ~ Title,
    str_ends(Title, " \\(MT[:digit:]+\\)$") ~ Title,
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )) %>%
  mutate(Medtech_ID = str_extract(Medtech_ID, "MT[:number:]+")) %>%
  mutate(Medtech_ID = if_else(!is.na(Medtech_ID),
                              paste0(" [", Medtech_ID, "]"),
                              "")) %>%

  # --- Clean title text ---
  mutate(Title = case_when(
    str_ends(Title, "\\]|ID[:digit:]+$|TS ID [:digit:]+$|  \\[[:digit:]+\\]$") ~
      str_remove_all(Title,
        " TS ID.+$| \\[ID.+$| ID[:digit:]+$| \\[[:digit:]+\\]$"
      ),
    str_starts(Title, "GID-MT[:digit:]+ ") ~
      str_remove(Title, "GID-MT[:digit:]+ "),
    str_ends(Title, " \\(MT[:digit:]+\\)$") ~
      str_remove(Title, " \\(MT[:digit:]+\\)$"),
    TRUE ~ Title
  )) %>%

        
    # Some entries are split across two rows for reasons that we don't understand. The next chunk of code is designed to identify these and add a note that they need manually checking.
    
mutate(
  Link = case_when(
    !is.na(Link) & str_starts(Link, "\\(http") ~ Link,
    !is.na(Link) & str_starts(Link, "http")   ~ paste0("(", Link, ")"),
    TRUE ~ " **MANUALLY CHECK THIS LINE AND THE ONE ABOVE**"
  )
) %>%
  
mutate(
  Title = paste0("[", Title, "]")
) %>%
  unite(Title, Title, Link, sep = "", na.rm = TRUE) %>%

  # ---- NORMALISE TYPE *AFTER* LINK ----
  mutate(Type = str_to_lower(Type)) %>%
  mutate(Type = case_when(
  is.na(Type) | Type == "" ~ "",
  str_starts(Type, "nice") ~ str_replace(Type, "nice", ". NICE"),
  TRUE ~ paste0(". NICE ", Type)
)) %>%

  # FINAL MERGE
  unite(Merged, Title, Type, ID, Medtech_ID, sep = "", na.rm = TRUE) %>%
  select(Merged)

  df
 }

reformat_prioritisation <- function(df) {

  # ---- Defensive column creation ----
  if (!"Title" %in% names(df)) {
    df$Title <- NA_character_
  }

  if (!"Link" %in% names(df)) {
    df$Link <- NA_character_
  }

  if (!"Decision date" %in% names(df)) {
    df$`Decision date` <- NA_character_
  }

  # ---- Begin transformation ----
  df <- df %>%

# ---- Create markdown hyperlink (ENDS AT ID) ----
mutate(
  Link = if_else(
    !is.na(Link) & str_starts(Link, "http"),
    paste0("(", Link, ")"),
    ""
  ),
  Title = paste0("[", Title, "]")
) %>%
    
    # Some entries are split across two rows for reasons that we don't understand. The next chunk of code is designed to identify these and add a note that they need manually checking.
    
mutate(
  Link = case_when(
    !is.na(Link) & str_starts(Link, "\\(http") ~ Link,
    !is.na(Link) & str_starts(Link, "http")   ~ paste0("(", Link, ")"),
    TRUE ~ " **MANUALLY CHECK THIS LINE AND THE ONE ABOVE**"
  )
) %>%
    
unite(Title, Title, Link, sep = "", na.rm = TRUE) %>%

    # --- Format decision date (bold prefix) ---
    mutate(`Decision date` = case_when(
      is.na(`Decision date`) | `Decision date` == "" ~ "",
      TRUE ~ paste0(". Decision date: ", `Decision date`)
    )) %>%
    
    # --- Create final merged output ---
    unite(
      Merged,
      Title,
      `Decision date`,
      sep = "",
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) %>%

    select(Merged)

  df
}

```


```{r process-files, echo=FALSE}

published_list   <- list()
development_list <- list()
deferred_list    <- list()
awaiting_list    <- list()
prioritisation_list  <- list ()

for (f in text_files) {


df <- read_delim(
  f,
  delim = "\t",
  quote = "\\\"",
  escape_double = FALSE,
  trim_ws = TRUE
)

cols <- names(df)
if (is.null(cols)) cols <- character()

if ("Published" %in% cols) {

  published_list[[basename(f)]] <- reformat_published(df)

} else if ("Deferred date" %in% cols) {

  deferred_list[[basename(f)]] <- reformat_deferred(df)

} else if ("Decision date" %in% cols) {

  prioritisation_list[[basename(f)]] <- reformat_prioritisation(df)

} else if (
  "Title" %in% cols &&
  "Type" %in% cols &&
  !"Expected publication date" %in% cols
) {

  awaiting_list[[basename(f)]] <- reformat_awaiting(df)

} else {

  # ✅ in development is the fallback
  development_list[[basename(f)]] <- reformat_in_development(df)

}
 
}
``` 

```{r bind-clean, echo=FALSE}
library(tibble)

# ----- Published -----
published_df <- bind_rows(published_list) 

if (!"Merged" %in% names(published_df)) {
  published_df <- tibble(Merged = character())
} else {
  
published_df <- published_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(Merged), str_trim(Merged) != "") %>%
  mutate(Year = as.numeric(str_extract(Merged, "20\\d{2}"))) %>%
  arrange(desc(Year))
}

# ----- In development -----
development_df <- bind_rows(development_list)

if (!"Merged" %in% names(development_df)) {
  development_df <- tibble(Merged = character())
} else {
  development_df <- development_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(Merged), str_trim(Merged) != "")
}

# ----- Deferred -----
deferred_df <- bind_rows(deferred_list)

if (!"Merged" %in% names(deferred_df)) {
  deferred_df <- tibble(Merged = character())
} else {
  deferred_df <- deferred_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(Merged), str_trim(Merged) != "")
}

# ----- Awaiting development -----
awaiting_df <- bind_rows(awaiting_list)

if (!"Merged" %in% names(awaiting_df)) {
  awaiting_df <- tibble(Merged = character())
} else {
  awaiting_df <- awaiting_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(Merged), str_trim(Merged) != "")
}

# ----- Topic prioritisation -----
prioritisation_df <- bind_rows(prioritisation_list)

if (!"Merged" %in% names(prioritisation_df)) {
  prioritisation_df <- tibble(Merged = character())
} else {
  prioritisation_df <- prioritisation_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(Merged), str_trim(Merged) != "")
}
```

## Published

```{r published, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
if (nrow(published_df) > 0) {
  kable(published_df["Merged"], col.names = NULL)
} else {
  cat("Nothing found")
}
```

```{r spacer_after_published, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
cat("\n\n\n")
```

## In development

```{r development, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
if (nrow(development_df) > 0) {
  kable(development_df["Merged"], col.names = NULL)
} else {
  cat("Nothing found")
}
```

```{r spacer_after_development, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
cat("\n\n\n")
```

## Awaiting development

```{r awaiting, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
if (nrow(awaiting_df) > 0) {
  kable(awaiting_df["Merged"], col.names = NULL)
} else {
  cat("Nothing found")
}
```

```{r spacer_after_awaiting, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
cat("\n\n\n")
```

## Deferred

```{r def, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
if (nrow(deferred_df) > 0) {
  kable(deferred_df["Merged"], col.names = NULL)
} else {
  cat("Nothing found")
}
```

```{r spacer_after_def, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
cat("\n\n\n")
```

## Topic prioritisation

```{r prioritisation, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
if (nrow(prioritisation_df) > 0) {
  kable(prioritisation_df["Merged"], col.names = NULL)
} else {
  cat("Nothing found")
}
```


```{r ensure-dfs, echo=FALSE}
library(tibble)

if (!exists("published_df")) {
  published_df <- tibble(Merged = character())
}

if (!exists("development_df")) {
  development_df <- tibble(Merged = character())
}

if (!exists("deferred_df")) {
  deferred_df <- tibble(Merged = character())
}

if (!exists("awaiting_df")) {
  awaiting_df <- tibble(Merged = character())

if (!exists("prioritisation_df")) {
  prioritisation_df <- tibble(Merged = character())
}  
  
}
```



```{r cleanup, include=FALSE}

#Code to remove the exported text file from the working directory to prevent accidentally generating two identical bibliographies.

invisible(file.remove(text_files))
```
